title: Minecraft VR
description: Basic VR Minecraft pack with some immersion. Just have SteamVR open and hit play!
body:
Basic VR Minecraft pack with some immersion. Just have SteamVR open and hit play!

 Gameplay Mods:
- Vivecraft
- Ambient Sounds
- ImmersiveMC
- Iris
- Lithium
- Sodium
- Mod Menu
- Forge Config Screens

Mods that make others work:
- CreativeCore
- Architectury
- Forge Config API Port
- MC VR API
- Fabric API
